PaddlePaddle的kl_div要求input为log-probabilities，label为probabilities（当log_target=False）或log-probabilities（当log_target=True）；而MindSpore的kl_div公式明确为L(x,target)=target*(log target - x)，其中x=logits（即未取log的原始输入），target=labels（概率）。因此二者语义不一致：Paddle中input是log-prob且log_target=True时label也应是log-prob，但MindSpore的logits必须是未取log的原始值。为对齐数学定义和框架行为，需使Paddle的input为log-prob、label为prob（log_target=False），MindSpore的logits为log-prob、labels为prob —— 但MindSpore文档明确要求logits是未取log的logits（即softmax前），故唯一兼容方式是令Paddle input=logits（非log-prob），log_target=False，label=prob；MindSpore logits=logits（同Paddle input），labels=prob。原始用例log_target=true导致Paddle将label解释为log-prob并计算log(label)-input，而MindSpore始终按log(labels)-logits计算，造成巨大差异。修复：统一设log_target=False，且确保label数据为合法概率分布（和为1 per sample）。

PaddlePaddle的kl_div要求input为log-probabilities，label为probabilities（log_target=False），而MindSpore的kl_div公式为target*(log target - logits)，即logits是未取log的输入，labels是概率目标；二者语义相反：Paddle expects log-input + prob-target, MindSpore expects raw-logits + prob-labels. 因此需将MindSpore的logits改为log(input)以对齐语义，否则数学定义不一致导致大误差（10.89）。修复方式：保持相同随机输入，但MindSpore侧传入log(input)作为logits，Paddle侧保持input作为log-probabilities。

PaddlePaddle的kl_div要求input为log-probabilities，label为probabilities（log_target=False），而MindSpore的kl_div(logits, labels)定义为L = labels * (log(labels) - logits)，即logits是未取log的原始logits（非-log-prob），labels是 probabilities；二者数学定义不一致：Paddle expects input=log(q), label=p → KL(p||q)=∑p·(log p - log q)，但MindSpore computes ∑p·(log p - logits)， meaning logits must equal log(q) to match. However, MindSpore doc explicitly states 'logits' (not log-probs) and formula uses 'logits' directly — so to align semantics, Paddle's input must be same as MindSpore's logits, but Paddle requires input to be log-prob; thus the inconsistency arises from mismatched input interpretation. Fix: set log_target=True in Paddle to make it interpret label as log-space, matching MindSpore's expectation that both are in same space — but wait: MindSpore doc says labels is probabilities (not log), and formula is target·(log target - logits), so labels must be valid probabilities (≥0, sum per sample=1). Therefore, the root cause is that test uses arbitrary float64 tensors not constrained to probability simplex — leading to undefined KL and framework-dependent handling of invalid inputs (e.g., negative labels, non-sum-1). Repair by enforcing valid probability inputs: normalize label to sum to 1 per sample, ensure non-negative, and use same random seed.

Since Paddle test uses log_target=True, MindSpore test must transform label via exp() to match probability space — but test cases only define shapes/dtypes, not values. PaddlePaddle的kl_div要求input为log-probabilities，label为probabilities（log_target=False），而MindSpore的kl_div(logits, labels)中logits是未取log的原始logits（即需softmax前），labels是targets；二者数学定义不同：Paddle计算target*(log(target)-log_input)，MindSpore计算target*(log(target)-logits)。为对齐语义，MindSpore应传入log_softmax(logits)，且Paddle input应为log_softmax(input)；但当前用例直接传入任意float64张量，导致结果不一致。修复方式：统一让input/logits为log-probabilities（即log_softmax输出），并确保label/target为 valid probabilities (sum-to-1 per sample)。
